basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Professor, Assistant and Asso Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) has released the official Faculty Positions Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. IITJMU/Faculty/02/2026 at the official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the IIT Jammu Faculty Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in the preceding degrees and a consistently good academic record can apply online on or before 31 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Upper age limit applicable as per statutory relaxations available for various categories as per GoI norms
age_limit.details: All Posts: Upper age limit applicable as per statutory relaxations available for various categories as per GoI norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in the preceding degrees with throughout consistently good academic record
qualification.details: Professor: Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in the preceding degrees with throughout consistently good academic record. Minimum ten years Teaching, Research, Industrial experience of which at least four years should be at the level of Associate Professor in IITs or in similar institutes of national importance. Associate Professor: Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in the preceding degrees with throughout consistently good academic record. A minimum of six years Teaching, Industry, Research experience, of which at least three years should be at the level of Assistant Professor in an academic institution. Assistant Professor Grade-I: Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in the preceding degrees with throughout consistently good academic record. A minimum of 3 years relevant industrial, research, teaching experience, excluding however, the experience gained while pursuing Ph.D. Assistant Professor Grade-II: Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in the preceding degrees with throughout consistently good academic record. Applicants satisfying all criteria other than the post Ph.D. experience criteria for Assistant Professor Grade I, may be appointed as Assistant Professor Grade II with appropriate pay based on post-doctoral experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Academic Pay Level 10 to 14A as per 7th CPC
salary_details.details: Professor: Academic Pay Level 14 A (Rs. 159100-220200) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 159100/- per month Associate Professor: Academic Pay Level 13A2 (Rs. 139600-211300) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 139600/- per month Assistant Professor Grade-I: Academic Pay Level 12 (Rs. 101500-167400) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 101500/- per month Assistant Professor Grade-II: At entry level, may be placed in Academic Pay Level 10 (Rs. 57700-98200) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 70900/- per month and shall be moved to Academic Level 11 after completion of one year post Ph.D experience.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Jammu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Jammu Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Professor: Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in the preceding degrees with throughout consistently good academic record. Minimum ten years Teaching, Research, Industrial experience of which at least four years should be at the level of Associate Professor in IITs or in similar institutes of national importance. Associate Professor: Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in the preceding degrees with throughout consistently good academic record. A minimum of six years Teaching, Industry, Research experience, of which at least three years should be at the level of Assistant Professor in an academic institution. Assistant Professor Grade-I: Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in the preceding degrees with throughout consistently good academic record. A minimum of 3 years relevant industrial, research, teaching experience, excluding however, the experience gained while pursuing Ph.D. Assistant Professor Grade-II: Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in the preceding degrees with throughout consistently good academic record. Applicants satisfying all criteria other than the post Ph.D. experience criteria for Assistant Professor Grade I, may be appointed as Assistant Professor Grade II with appropriate pay based on post-doctoral experience.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: Upper age limit applicable as per statutory relaxations available for various categories as per GoI norms.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Professor: Academic Pay Level 14 A (Rs. 159100-220200) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 159100/- per month Associate Professor: Academic Pay Level 13A2 (Rs. 139600-211300) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 139600/- per month Assistant Professor Grade-I: Academic Pay Level 12 (Rs. 101500-167400) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 101500/- per month Assistant Professor Grade-II: At entry level, may be placed in Academic Pay Level 10 (Rs. 57700-98200) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 70900/- per month and shall be moved to Academic Level 11 after completion of one year post Ph.D experience.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Jammu Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Jammu Faculty Positions is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu has announced a total of 4 vacancies for Faculty Positions in their latest recruitment drive for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification for all faculty positions is a Ph.D. in a relevant area with first-class or equivalent in the preceding degrees and a consistently good academic record.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for IIT Jammu Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIT Jammu Faculty Positions as per the available information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the faculty positions at IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: The salary for the faculty positions ranges from Academic Pay Level 10 to 14A as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC), with specific pay scales for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor grades.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IIT Jammu Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves three stages: Shortlisting of candidates, followed by a Research & Teaching Presentation, and finally, an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Jammu Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for applying to these faculty positions?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not explicitly mentioned with specific numbers, but the notification states that upper age limit relaxation is applicable as per statutory relaxations available for various categories as per GoI norms.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the IIT Jammu Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIT Jammu or via the direct application link provided in the Important Links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu is located in Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir, with the pincode 181221.
